caption:
🎉 Community Celebration – Don’t Miss Out! 🎉
Join us for a day of great music, delicious food, and good vibes!
 🍛 Curry goat & jollof rice 🎨 Arts & crafts workshops 🎶 Live music 🎁 Auction with amazing items

Bring your friends and family for a day full of joy, laughter, and connection 💛

We’re raising funds for: 👉 Bethwin Adventure Playground 👉 The Neurodiversity Family Hub
Come, listen, eat, drink, and share!
